name: Mobile Mode - mobile sites + device emulation on desktop
description: Toolbar popup with two ways to get mobile on desktop: (1) Mobile UA only - rewrites the User-Agent so UA-sniffing sites (Facebook, YouTube) serve their mobile site, no banner; (2) Device mode - true DevTools-style viewport emulation via the debugger API that reflows ANY site (normal CSS-responsive ones too), shows Chrome's debugging banner.
